回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 時事英文 (English for Current Events)	開課班級 : 華文一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 楊惠玲	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course aims to enhance students’ English proficiency by developing their listening, reading, and critical thinking skills through exposure to authentic news articles and podcasts. Students will learn to comprehend main ideas, analyze perspectives, and express informed opinions on current local and global issues. 


2.教學綱要
This course is designed to enhance students’ English comprehension and critical thinking skills through guided news reading and podcast listening. Students will explore a wide range of topics from both local and international news sources, particularyly current events. Emphasis will be placed on developing the ability to understand main ideas, recognize supporting details, and evaluate perspectives presented in different media formats.

To support diverse learning styles, various visual and audio materials—such as video clips, news broadcasts, and interview excerpts—will be integrated as supplementary resources. These materials aim to enrich students’ understanding of the news content and improve their listening and analytical skills.

Assessment will include periodic quizzes, in-class assignments, and reflective tasks designed to track students’ learning progress.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
quizzes: 55%; homework assignments: 20%; participation: 25% 
Unless otherwise addressed, no personal electronic devices are allowed in class. 
Being absent for three times before the midterm may result in an early warming. Once the number of absence reaches six, no final exam (including other assignments) can be given to the student. 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG11 永續城鄉


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
